title: polypodium lineare var. onoei
intro: Polypodium lineare var. onoei, also known as Japanese polypody or Kinnikku, is a type of fern native to Japan and other parts of East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium lineare var. onoei include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and dried forms, although its usage should be carefully monitored due to potential side effects.
